name: Blazing Bolts
desc_raw:
Purge.
Deal 30 damage to the front enemy unit. Add a stronger version of this card to your discard.<hr>Purge.
Deal 30 damage to a random unit, two times. Add a stronger version of this card to your discard.<hr>Deal 30 damage to a random unit, four times.
